source_pr.title: *: fix prepared statement panic
source_pr.body:
`ast.SelectStmt.Fields` is changed during plan building,
newly created `ast.ColumnNameExpr` has nil Refer.

symptoms: id, _, _, err = se.PrepareStmt("select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (session_test.go)
failure_signature: id, _, _, err = se.PrepareStmt("select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (session_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: id, _, _, err = se.PrepareStmt("select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (session_test.go)

analysis:
PR title: *: fix prepared statement panic
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/2767
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: id, _, _, err = se.PrepareStmt("select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (session_test.go)
Changed files (2): plan/logical_plan_builder.go, session_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/2767.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=session_test.go name=session_test
